docs.title: itty-router Official Documentation
docs.description: Ultra-tiny API microrouter (~450 bytes) designed for Cloudflare Workers and serverless environments. Zero dependencies, TypeScript, and route-parsing.

docs.title: itty-router Getting Started
docs.description: Quick-start guide covering basic routing, middleware, error handling, and environment setup.

docs.description: Guide to using itty-router specifically on Cloudflare Workers with export patterns.
